series_metadata.series_description: All building Occupancy Certificates, As-Built documents (record documents, drawings, and specifications), operations and maintenance manuals, warranties, and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. Copies provided to project owner and to State Archives for historical review. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close. Copies provided to project owner and to State Archives for historical review., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
